title: Create Improved Test Script
description:
Write a Python script that improves the test script for the Agent Representation Broker to make it more robust to port conflicts by:
1. Adding port availability checking with socket-based detection
2. Implementing automatic port selection with configurable start port
3. Adding proper environment variable handling for server configuration
4. Improving error handling and cleanup
5. Adding clearer status messages during testing

title: Update Documentation
description:
Update the README.md file to document the improvements made to the test script, including:
1. Explanation of the port conflict handling
2. Usage instructions for the improved script
3. Benefits of the new approach
4. Verification information

title: Create Summary Files
description:
Create summary files (plan.md, final_plan.md, SUMMARY.md) that explain:
1. The problem with the original test script
2. The solution implemented
3. Key features of the improved script
4. Usage instructions
5. Benefits and verification information
